title: Lab: Repair a Mutual-Aid Resource Catalog
summary: Lab: Repair a Mutual-Aid Resource Catalog retrieves prior skills in an original broken relief-supply catalog incident scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply table structure, table header associations in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real broken relief-supply catalog incident artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Broken relief-supply catalog incident case 1: put every cell directly inside table because browsers infer the missing rows.
Broken relief-supply catalog incident case 1: use a table only for two-dimensional data, give it a caption, and preserve row and column meaning without CSS.
Broken relief-supply catalog incident case 1: use div elements with grid styling because visual columns automatically announce table relationships.
